prompt:
Mun SwiftBar-plugin ei näytä mitään menu barissa. Voitko katsoa mikä on vialla? Tiedosto on nimeltään status.sh ja sisältö on:

```
#/bin/bash
echo Status: OK
echo ---
echo Details
echo Click here | href=https://google.com
```

assertions.text: Identifies the missing ! in shebang (#/bin/bash should be #!/bin/bash)
Identifies that the pipe character in 'echo Click here | href=...' is interpreted by bash as a pipe operator, not passed to stdout
Provides a corrected version of the plugin script
Explains why the issues cause the plugin to not display (not just what to fix, but why it breaks)
